---
title: "Xingchen Liu"
image: images/Xingchen Liu.jpg
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: rectangle
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dvj0bhwAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6576-2434
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am currently working as a Research Assistant Professor in the Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. My research interests include condition monitoring, fault diagnosis, prognostics and health management, and machine learning.

## Opportunities

I am looking for a motivated PhD student with strong programming, engineering, and/or mathematical foundations to work with me. If you're interested, please feel free to email me your CV, transcript(s), and a brief description of your research interests. I review all inquires but may only be able to reply to selected candidates.

## Work Experience

- 2025.01–present: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering, **Research Assistant Professor**
- 2023.07–2024.12: Hong Kong Science Park, Centre for Advances in Reliability and Safety, **Postdoctoral Fellow**, mentor: Prof. [C.K.M. LEE](https://www.polyu.edu.hk/ise/people/academic-staff/carman-km-lee/)
- 2022.01–2023.04: City University of Hong Kong, Department of Advanced Design and Systems Engineering, **Postdoc.**, mentor: Prof. [Min XIE](https://scholars.cityu.edu.hk/en/persons/minxie/)

## Education

- 2017.08–2021.08: National University of Singapore, Department of Industrial Systems Engineering and Management, **Ph.D.**, supervisor: Prof. [Zhi-Sheng YE](https://cde.nus.edu.sg/isem/staff/ye-zhisheng/)
- 2014.09–2017.06: University of Science and Technology of China, Instrument Science and Technology, **M.Sc.**, supervoisor: Prof. [Qingbo HE](https://me.sjtu.edu.cn/en/FullTimeTeacher/heqingbo.html)
- 2010.09–2014.06: Hunan University, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation, **B.Eng.**

## Contact
- Email: xingcliu@polyu.edu.hk (Primary); xingchenliu@u.nus.edu 
- Phone: (852) 2766 6580
- Office: E Building, 6th Floor, Room EF612
- Address: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University, Hong Kong

<a href="https://info.flagcounter.com/ay5X"><img src="https://s01.flagcounter.com/count/ay5X/bg_FFFFFF/txt_000000/border_CCCCCC/columns_2/maxflags_10/viewers_0/labels_1/pageviews_1/flags_0/percent_0/" alt="Flag Counter" border="0"></a>
:::
